Interior Concepts

A definitive collection of architectural presets and furniture ensembles from the Iron Age of the Rune Empires. Every layout is rendered with volumetric shadows and soul-fire illumination for high-fidelity world-building.

LEGENDARY

Obsidian Throne Hall

#ARC-001

The seat of the Iron Sovereign, carved from volcanic glass.

LOD LEVEL
EPIC

Cinder-Glass Lab

#ARC-002

Experimental suite for soul-fire stabilization.

LOD LEVEL
LEGENDARY

Iron-Bound Treasury

#ARC-003

Subterranean storage with high-security runic seals.
